Cardboard Maker's Space

Date: April 3, 2026
Time: 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM
Ages: All ages

About This Event

Join us for a night of creativity and invention! All ages are invited to come be creative with cardboard. Design a robot, construct an architectural structure, or create a piece of art — the possibilities are endless.

What You'll Do

  • Build, design, and invent using cardboard and crafting supplies
  • Express your creativity — make whatever you imagine: robots, buildings, sculptures, and more
  • Work alongside other young makers in a collaborative, open-ended space

Cost

$10 per person — all supplies provided.

Details

  • All ages — projects for everyone!
  • Space is limited, so register early to secure your spot.

Registration

Register below to reserve your spot at the Cardboard Maker's Space!

Secure your spot before time runs out!
